arts.ttl: Rodri Fires Back at Cristiano Ronaldo's Ballon d'Or Criticism
arts.sum: Rodri hit back at Cristiano Ronaldo's recent claims that Vinícius Júnior deserved to win the 2024 Ballon d'Or.

arts.ttl: Man City plans for 19-year-old Argentine talent 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Claudio Echeverri has been tipped to link up with Manchester City from next month, having spent the past year on loan at home in Argentina.

arts.ttl: Player has returned to Manchester City after ‘re-evaluation’ of loan – Missed training to go back to Etihad
arts.sum: Defender Issa Kaboré is ‘no longer a Benfica player’ and has returned to Manchester City from his loan spell at the Portuguese side. That’s according to Record, who reports that the defender has been sent back to Etihad after a ‘re-evaluation’ between Manchester City and Benfica. arts.ttl: Guardiola Tells Ex-Man City Star he 'Regrets' Selling Him - It's Not Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has named Jesus Navas as a surprising player that he regrets selling during his time at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Man City veteran on radar of three Saudi clubs as Citizens eye up replacement?
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Kyle Walker is reportedly attracting interest from three Saudi Pro League clubs during the January transfer window.
